title: エアシャカールのダービー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's Derby features the generation after
Meisho Doto's. The crowd favorite, Air Shakur,
loses the crown by a mere seven centimeters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, this hardly upsets the racer in question.
She had apparently anticipated this result all
along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The future is restrained by sets of numbers. Thus,
Meisho Doto's future, too, is bound by a certain
limit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Doto's clumsy nature introduces so many
variables, so she might just be able to confound
the calculations.
